reason: Address Greptile review findings on the published Supermemory Admin CLI before merge.
notes: Removed unreachable auth fallback from agent context.
Emits a structured sync_warning when --latest-only is ignored because --since is set.
Blocks MCP callers from overriding timeout and rate-limit root flags.
Sets User-Agent from the CLI runtime version instead of a static API version.
Preserves explicit --threshold 0.0 in the promoted recall request body.
